import React from'react';import'../styles/Wall.css';import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ROTATIONS=[-2.5,-1.5,0,1,2,-1,1.5,-0.5,2.5,-2];/**
